ideation: This animation sequence simulates someone settling into a seat.  It begins with arms slightly raised, as if preparing to sit, then moves to a relaxed position with arms at the sides, finally ending with a comfortable posture. The robot's lack of elbows necessitates a focus on shoulder movements to convey the action naturally.  I will use slight variations in joint angles to avoid rigid, mechanical movements.

frames.beat: arms lift slightly, preparing to sit down
arms lower, settling into the seat
arms rest comfortably at the sides
